name: Schylling NeeDoh Original - Sensory Fidget Toy - Pink - Ages 3 to Adult , 1 Count ( Pack of 1)
bullets: The groovy Glob of gratifying goo, this ultimate stress ball will help you mellow out and find inner Peace, tranquility and calm mindfulness
Feeling stressed and on edge? You knead Nee Doh. Give it a squeeze, a squish, a pull or a smush, it'll sooth your soul and get you feeling groovy fast
Filled with a mysterious, completely non-toxic, jelly-like compound, it's strong, durable and won't break open; always returns to its original shape
Hypoallergenic and completely safe, It contains no BPA, phthalates or latex; cleans easily with soap and water
A great fidget toy; appropriate for those with add, ADHD, ocd, Autism and anxiety; helps promote focus, attention and centering, for ages 3+
description: Stretch, squish, soothe your soul. Schylling's original NeeDoh is the groovy glob that sparked a squish sensation! Packed with a soft filling and vibrant colors, NeeDoh delivers satisfying sensory fun for a range of ages—from playful kids to busy adults. Perfect for focus, stress relief, busting boredom, or just grooving through your day, NeeDoh helps you find your mellow.

reviews.name: Isaac
reviews.title: One of my favorites
reviews.body: I’ve gotten this ball for Christmas for the past 3 years and it’s one of my favorite things to have. Very fun the throw around with friends or myself. They do however break fairly easy. After a week or two of throwing around a squeezing, a little rip may appear. But I do throw it around A LOT, so it can take a fair bit of use. If one breaks, I’ll buy another, because how awesome they are.Side…

reviews.name: Cram
reviews.title: Groovy glob Needoh!
reviews.body: This Groovy glob Needoh is the perfect example of a good sensory toy! Its texture is perfect with both smooth and soft textures! Its size is a little bit smaller than the gumdrop Needoh! Overall it’s really fun to play with!! Definitely worth $8 and will buy again!!

reviews.name: Benjamin
reviews.title: Schylling NeeDoh Original - Sensory Fidget Toy
reviews.body: A Must-Have for Stress Relief and Focus!"The Schylling NeeDoh Original has quickly become one of my favorite go-to fidget toys for stress relief and maintaining focus. From the moment I first held it, I knew it was something special. The texture is incredibly soft, squishy, and just the right amount of resistance when you squeeze it. It’s super satisfying to squish, stretch, and mold in your…

reviews.name: Jeremy Leventhal
reviews.title: Doesn’t hold up well
reviews.body: Worked well for few months and then started leaking.
